step_by_step_thinking:
Metoprolol is a beta-blocker, and adding verapamil, a calcium-channel blocker, could potentially slow down the heart rate further leading to bradyarrhythmias or even complete heart block if there's already some degree of conduction disturbance present.
\boxed{\text{B}}

```plaintext
\boxed{\text{B}}
```
